{"filled_text": "19 April 2026

Dear Demo Student,

Congratulations. On behalf of the Yayasan Universiti Malaya Scholarship Committee, I am pleased to inform you that your application for the Yayasan UM Scholarship has been APPROVED.

Award details:
- Scholarship: Yayasan Universiti Malaya
- Coverage: Tuition + monthly stipend (per current rates)
- Effective: Semester 2, 2025/2026
- Renewal condition: Maintain CGPA >= 3.30 each semester. As your current CGPA is 3.10, the committee has approved your application with a 6-month review clause — your CGPA at the end of the next semester will be assessed; recovery to 3.30+ confirms continued award.

Next steps:
1. Reply to scholarship@um.edu.my within 7 days to confirm acceptance.
2. Sign the scholarship agreement (will be emailed to you).
3. Open a Maybank account in your name if you don't already have one (for stipend disbursement).

We look forward to supporting your academic journey at FSKTM.

Warm regards,
Yayasan UM Scholarship Office
Universiti Malaya", "placeholder_values": {"{{date}}": "19 April 2026", "{{student_name}}": "Demo Student", "{{procedure_name}}": "Yayasan UM Scholarship", "{{cgpa}}": "3.10", "{{faculty}}": "FSKTM"}, "unfilled_placeholders": []}
